labels: bug, beta-feedback

### 🖥️ System Environment
* **Operating System:** (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS)
* **Terminal Emulator Used:** (e.g., PowerShell, Windows Terminal, GNOME Terminal, iTerm2)
* **Python Version:** (e.g., Python 3.10)

### 🎯 Beta Focus Areas
**1. UI Rendering & Responsiveness**
* *Did the dashboard scale correctly when you resized your terminal window? Were any tables misaligned, or did the high-res braille graphs render strangely?*
> [Your feedback here]

**2. Keyboard Controls & Input**
* *Did the terminal hotkeys (H, I, S, C, etc.) respond instantly? Did opening a menu interrupt the live telemetry loops in the background?*
> [Your feedback here]

**3. Auto-Discovery & Hardware Detection**
* *Did the `SwarmHunter` successfully find your ASICs on the local subnet? Were your specific board versions (Gamma, GT800, NerdQAxe) classified accurately?*
> [Your feedback here]

### 🐛 Issue Description (If applicable)
* **What happened?** (Describe the glitch, crash, or unexpected behavior)
* **Steps to reproduce:** (How can I make this happen on my end?)
